registry_metadata.protocol: ENTERPRISE FORENSIC REPAIR & BOOTSTRAP RECOVERY PROTOCOL V12

requirements.description: Deeply investigate the entire codebase
Verify every route
Verify every authentication flow
Verify every database relationship
Verify every Face AI pipeline
requirements.validation_method: Trace face pipeline from capture to match

requirements.description: Verify every bootstrap flow
requirements.validation_method: Trace bootstrap from /setup/admin-face to admin creation

requirements.description: Verify every recovery flow
requirements.completion_criteria: Recovery flow verified end-to-end with OTP

requirements.description: Verify every frontend route
requirements.validation_method: Enumerate all React Router routes, test navigation
requirements.completion_criteria: All frontend routes render expected UI

requirements.description: Verify every nginx route
requirements.validation_method: Audit nginx config for proxy_pass, location blocks
requirements.completion_criteria: All nginx routes correctly forward to services

requirements.description: Verify every Docker service
requirements.validation_method: docker compose ps, health check status

requirements.description: Verify every migration 001-018
requirements.validation_method: Check migration history table, verify all applied

requirements.description: Verify every Redis interaction
requirements.validation_method: Audit Redis key usage: sessions, OTP, device trust, verification flags

requirements.description: Verify every JWT flow
requirements.completion_criteria: JWT sign, verify, refresh all functional

requirements.description: Verify every face enrollment flow
requirements.validation_method: Trace admin and employee enrollment end-to-end
requirements.completion_criteria: Face enrollment stores image and embedding correctly

requirements.description: Verify every face login flow
requirements.validation_method: Trace face login from camera capture to dashboard
requirements.completion_criteria: Face login returns valid JWT and redirects to dashboard

requirements.description: Verify every admin flow
requirements.validation_method: Verify admin dashboard, employee management, reports
requirements.completion_criteria: Admin dashboard and all admin features operational

requirements.description: Verify every employee flow
requirements.validation_method: Verify employee login, attendance, leave, reports
requirements.completion_criteria: Employee dashboard and all features operational

requirements.description: Verify every database trigger
requirements.validation_method: Audit all trigger definitions for recursion, correct behavior
requirements.completion_criteria: No recursive triggers, all triggers fire correctly

requirements.description: Verify every foreign key
requirements.completion_criteria: All FKs valid, no orphaned records

requirements.description: Verify every container health check
requirements.validation_method: docker inspect health status per container

requirements.description: Repair ONLY confirmed defects
requirements.validation_method: Each repair must reference a finding from audit reports
requirements.completion_criteria: No repair without documented root cause

requirements.description: Generate PRIORITY_FILE_FORENSIC_REPORT.md with root causes, dependency analysis, runtime impact, security impact, repair recommendations
requirements.validation_method: File exists and contains all sections

requirements.description: No repair may begin until PRIORITY_FILE_FORENSIC_REPORT.md is completed
requirements.completion_criteria: Report verified before any repair starts

requirements.description: Generate SYSTEM_STATE_SNAPSHOT.md before any modification
requirements.completion_criteria: Snapshot generated capturing containers, health, logs, routes, schema, Redis

requirements.description: Generate ROUTE_DISCOVERY_MAP.md
Generate API_ENDPOINT_DISCOVERY_MAP.md
Generate DATABASE_SCHEMA_SNAPSHOT.md
Generate DOCKER_RUNTIME_STATE.md
Generate REDIS_RUNTIME_STATE.md
Store all evidence in /forensic-evidence/<timestamp>/
Create named checkpoint before ANY modification
requirements.validation_method: Checkpoint directory exists with all artifacts
requirements.completion_criteria: Checkpoint created with correct name format

requirements.description: Generate FILE_HASH_MANIFEST.json in checkpoint
requirements.completion_criteria: SHA256 hashes of all affected files recorded

requirements.description: Generate ROUTE_DEPENDENCY_MAP.json, AUTH_DEPENDENCY_MAP.json, DATABASE_RELATIONSHIP_MAP.json, SERVICE_COMMUNICATION_MAP.json
requirements.completion_criteria: All dependency maps generated in checkpoint

requirements.description: Generate MISSION_CONTROL.md, MISSION_INDEX.json, OBJECTIVE_TRACKER.json, REPAIR_PROGRESS_LEDGER.json, COMPLIANCE_TRACKER.json, REQUIREMENT_TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md
Every major phase completion MUST update MISSION_CONTROL.md, OBJECTIVE_TRACKER.json, REPAIR_PROGRESS_LEDGER.json
requirements.completion_criteria: Mission control files reflect current state at all times

requirements.description: Convert all 19 protocol sections into tracked objectives with status
Generate REPAIR_PROGRESS_LEDGER.json logging every repair with timestamp, file, reason, impact, validation, checkpoint
requirements.validation_method: File exists and is updated per repair

requirements.description: Before every modification verify no forbidden action, generate COMPLIANCE_CHECK_REPORT.md
Before every new phase re-read mission control files and generate PHASE_RECONCILIATION_REPORT.md
requirements.validation_method: Report generated at each phase transition

requirements.description: If execution stops: resume from latest validated checkpoint, never restart from beginning
Before declaring success: PROTOCOL_SECTION_INDEX.json, MASTER_REQUIREMENT_REGISTRY.json, PROTOCOL_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md, FINAL_PROTOCOL_COMPLIANCE_AUDIT.md all show 100%
Generate MISSION_COMPLETION_CERTIFICATE.md
requirements.completion_criteria: Certificate generated after all objectives COMPLETED

requirements.description: Read entire protocol from first line to last line
Generate PROTOCOL_SECTION_INDEX.json with all sections
Generate MASTER_REQUIREMENT_REGISTRY.json with every requirement
Generate PROTOCOL_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md verifying 100% coverage
Generate REQUIREMENT_RECONCILIATION_REPORT.md before every phase transition
Never allow any repair that removes routes, features, pages, APIs, services
Never delete migrations, tables, rewrite architecture, disable security, bypass recovery validation, reduce auth requirements, disable audit logging
After every repair: test every route, every endpoint, face pipeline, database, Docker
requirements.validation_method: Validation suite run after each repair

requirements.description: Admin bootstrap works
Admin recovery works with OTP
requirements.completion_criteria: Recovery flow completes with OTP verification

requirements.description: Admin face enrollment and login work
requirements.validation_method: E2E test face enrollment and login
requirements.completion_criteria: Admin face enrolled and login succeeds

requirements.description: Employee password and face login work
Reports, Leave, Attendance, Dashboard pages all load
No console errors, API errors, DB errors, Redis errors, migration errors, trigger errors
No merge conflicts, no broken dependencies, all containers healthy, all health checks passing
requirements.validation_method: docker ps, grep for conflict markers

requirements.description: Admin bootstrap and recovery remain functional after container restart
Database migrations remain idempotent
Recovery OTP expires correctly, Redis recovery flags removed after recovery
requirements.validation_method: Test OTP expiry and flag cleanup
requirements.completion_criteria: OTP and Redis flags behave correctly

requirements.description: No unresolved Git conflict markers exist anywhere in the repository
requirements.completion_criteria: Zero conflict markers in entire codebase

requirements.description: Generate POST_RESTART_VALIDATION_REPORT.md
Create final backup: database_final_backup.sql, final_dependency_snapshot.json, final_route_map.json
Restart all services: PostgreSQL, Redis, Backend API, Face AI, Frontend, Nginx
requirements.validation_method: docker compose restart, verify all healthy

requirements.description: Confirm all URLs return HTTP 200 after restart
Database reset only if user explicitly requests it
requirements.validation_method: Check user request for explicit reset

requirements.description: Never perform full database wipe, DROP TABLE, or schema deletion
Protected data (employees, admin, bootstrap config, face embeddings, attendance, leave, reports, audit, migration history) must never be removed
Generate DATABASE_DEPENDENCY_ANALYSIS.md and DATABASE_CLEANUP_PLAN.md before any cleanup
requirements.completion_criteria: Both files generated before any cleanup

requirements.description: Allowed cleanup: expired OTPs, expired sessions, orphaned uploads, invalid cache, corrupted duplicate embeddings, abandoned recovery requests, temp artifacts
If resume needed: read repair_manifest.json, locate latest checkpoint, verify file hashes, resume from last checkpoint
requirements.completion_criteria: Execution resumes from exact stopping point

requirements.description: Generate RESUME_VALIDATION_REPORT.md and POST_RESUME_INTEGRITY_REPORT.md on resume
Generate SYSTEM_CERTIFICATION_REPORT.md after 12-step certification
requirements.validation_method: File exists with all 12 checks passed

requirements.description: Validate complete admin face auth lifecycle: Enrollment → Storage → Embedding → Login → Dashboard
Validate complete employee face auth lifecycle: Enrollment → Storage → Embedding → Login → Dashboard
Generate END_TO_END_FACE_AUTH_REPORT.md
One-time Fresh Installation Reset: create backups, export evidence/reports/checkpoints, execute selective cleanup
requirements.validation_method: Backups created, cleanup executed per policy

requirements.description: After reset: restart platform, verify bootstrap available, admin setup available, face enrollment available, all containers healthy, all URLs HTTP 200
Generate PRE_RESET_VALIDATION_REPORT.md, DATABASE_RESET_REPORT.md, POST_RESET_VALIDATION_REPORT.md
Generate all 30 final deliverable documents listed in FINAL_DELIVERABLES section
Declare success ONLY after every investigation, repair, validation, acceptance test, and deliverable completed successfully
